description.value:
Once per day, the intelligent battleaxe @UUID[Compendium.cotct-pf2e-conversion.cotct-items.Item.appUkwarAxe00001]{Ukwar} drinks from her wielder: the first time each day she draws blood in anger, her wielder attempts @Check[type:fortitude|dc:30] or becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

Apply this effect to the wielder when the bite lands; it expires after a day, signalling that her thirst has returned. The drained condition itself recovers as normal (it is not tied to this marker).

publication.title: Pathfinder: Curse of the Crimson Throne (PF2e conversion, private)
